title: Floor Mutation Event Schema
description: Schema for validating mutation events applied to replayed floors.

mutation_event_id.description: Unique identifier for this mutation event.

floor_id.description: The ID of the floor this mutation event applies to.

source_outcome.description: The outcome that triggered this mutation event.

triggering_residue_id.description: The ID of the residue record that triggered this mutation event.

applied_channels.description: List of mutation channels that were affected by this event.

channel_id.description: The ID of the mutation channel this mutation belongs to.

mutation_id.description: Unique identifier for this specific mutation.

preserves_floor_identity.description: True if this mutation is designed to preserve floor identity.

preserves_playability.description: True if this mutation is designed to preserve floor playability.

mutations.description: List of individual mutations applied during this event.

floor_identity_preserved.description: Overall status: True if the floor's identity is preserved after this event.

playability_preserved.description: Overall status: True if the floor's playability is preserved after this event.

mutation_timestamp.description: Timestamp when this mutation event occurred.
